title: Major Bugs Batch 2 Complete — Service Leaks, IO Threading, Battery
objective: Fix background service leaks, move SQLite/File I/O off main thread, add WakeWordDetector battery optimization
completed: WakeWordDetector: added pauseListening/resumeListening/isScreenOn for battery optimization
WakeWordDetector: removed STREAM_NOTIFICATION mute side effect
WakeWordDetector: added isPaused guard in startListening
MainActivity.setupProfileSpinner: DateProfileDbHelper calls moved to Dispatchers.IO
next_steps: Address remaining Major bugs: anonymous listener inner class leaks in FloatingWidgetService, audio focus loss handler, TopicManager unbounded keyword growth, DynamicRulesManager performance, ContextManager synchronization
context_summary: Successfully completed Batch 2 of Major Bug fixes. Fixed sensor listener leak in FloatingWidgetService.onDestroy with explicit unregisterListener. Moved file I/O in writeIncidentLog and SituationLogManager.saveReportToDisk to background IO dispatchers. Implemented battery-aware WakeWordDetector with screen-off detection (PowerManager.isInteractive), pause/resume methods, and removed notification stream muting side effect. Moved DateProfileDbHelper SQLite calls off main thread in MainActivity.setupProfileSpinner. All 56 tests pass on both debug and release variants.
